content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: staffing:small_team_of_6 ∧ ops:part_time_devops ∧ timeline:4_months ∧ data_store:PostgreSQL
H: suitable_for_modest_traffic ∧ efficient_with_limited_resources ∧ allows_for_future_split ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith)
P: develop_core_app → integrate_billing_features_later → utilize_postgresql_effectively
R: ! scalability_issues_later_on ∧ ! tight_deadlines_may_negotiate_quality ∧ ! complexity_in_feature_split
A: the_modular_monolith_structure_supports_fast_delivery_and_future_growth

[AUDIT]
Choice based on team's capacity and timeline.

structured_data.audit: Choice based on team's capacity and timeline.
